conservative.name: Unconventional Application
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target. As part of this action, you grab one of your inventions and smash it over your opponent's head, damaging it

success.description: As above, plus you deal additional damage equal to the number of modifications on the Invention

chaosStar.description: Crash tinkle! Your Invention is not just damaged, it is destroyed. You'll have to rebuild it

sigmarsComet.description: Sproing smash! Something breaks just the right way; ignore your target's soak value against this attack

reckless.name: Unconventional Application
reckless.requirements: Engaged with target. As part of this action, you grab 1 of your inventions and smash it over your opponent's head, damaging it

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage
As above, plus you deal additional damage equal to the number of modifications on the Invention

boon.description: Deal additional damage equal to your ranks of training in Dwarf Engineering

chaosStar.description: Crash tinkle! Your Invention is not just damaged, it is destroyed. You'll have to rebuild it

sigmarsComet.description: Reveal criticals until you reveal 1 with severity equal to the total modifications on the Invention. Apply that critical wound to the target, discard the rest
